vocab.example: When it comes to leisure activities, my brother and I are diametrically opposed; he loves extreme sports while I prefer reading.

vocab.meaning: một sự giống nhau đến kinh ngạc
vocab.example: There is a striking resemblance between my father's interests and mine, as we both share a deep passion for historical documentaries.

vocab.meaning: có tính di truyền/là đặc điểm chung của gia đình
vocab.example: A knack for gardening seems to run in the family, as almost everyone in my house spends their weekends tending to the backyard.

vocab.meaning: khác biệt, đi chệch khỏi (xu hướng chung)
vocab.example: I tend to diverge from my family's traditional hobbies, opting for digital art instead of the classic oil painting they enjoy.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích/hoạt động cá nhân (làm một mình)
vocab.example: Unlike my siblings who enjoy team sports, I prefer the solitary pursuit of long-distance running.
Cooking is the only common ground we share, where the whole family gathers to experiment with new recipes.

vocab.meaning: rất khác biệt so với cái gì
vocab.example: My preference for heavy metal music is a far cry from my parents' fondness for classical opera.
The love for outdoor exploration is deeply ingrained in our family culture, having been passed down through generations.

vocab.meaning: những người/vật hoàn toàn đối lập
vocab.example: My sister and I are polar opposites when it comes to fashion; she follows every trend while I stick to vintage styles.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy một cảm giác về...
vocab.example: Sharing the same hobby of hiking helps foster a sense of togetherness and mutual understanding among us.
